title: ZeroGuard account 0guard product update
tweets:
0guard is submitted for the 0G APAC Hackathon.

The live stack is a read-only pre-wallet firewall for AI agents and Telegram wallet surfaces: intent in, verdict/proof out, signer untouched.

#0GHackathon #BuildOn0G

Current proof stack:

- 28/28 incident-derived detections
- 0G mainnet receipt anchor
- Telegram Mini App
- wallet alert previews
- 30 rights-aware source lanes
- 17 no-network connector candidates

New source lanes: ThreatFox IOC API, Chainalysis sanctions oracle, Google Cloud Web Risk.

Disabled by default until auth, commercial terms, privacy, and retention rules are reviewed.

Derived evidence only. No raw feed resale.

Proof hub:
https://arigatoexpress.github.io/0guard/hackathon-0g/

Mini App:
https://guard0-miniapp-s77j6bxyra-uc.a.run.app/telegram
